issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer; - [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed; - [x] This is not an ad/bug report. ### Problem description I have no idea if this is the right form or not. This popup should be added to the "AdGuard – Popup Overlays" list since that list "blocks all kinds of non-functional pop-ups: promotion notifications, share link suggestions or newsletter signups, and suchlike". ### Proposed solution All of the DIVs have classes with absurd nonsense like "c11n srp-fPSBzf srp-iRgpoQ srp-hNvgav srp-eervcL srp-jTWvec srp-BCPsj srp-eCANtc srp-jTRfJn srp-znjqY srp-AxiDU srp-iQnMty srp-djPRwn srp-hOlPqz srp-bYnQJI" so I have no idea how you deal with that. ### Additional information _No response_
